== Notes for [[Item:Q113086|Q113086]] ==

<pre>Father: Fernando Gonzalez, Count of Castile, Burgos, & Lara b. 910, d. Jun 970. Mother: Urraca of Navarre [of Pamplona] d. 12 Aug 1041. Children: Salvador Perez, Count of Castile+ Fernando Perez of Castile Gonzalo Perez of Castile Rodrigo Perez of Castile Citations: [S2343] Unknown author, Europaische Stammtafeln, by Isenburg, Vol. II, chart 51.</pre>

<pre>Father: Count Fernan Gonzalez De Lara Of Castile (Abt 0910-0970) 1 2 6 Mother: Urraca Of Pamplona ( -1041) 2 6</pre> http://www.e-familytree.net/f245.htm#f78368

SOURCE NOTES:
www.dcs.hull.ac.uk/cgi-bin/gedlkup/n=royal?royal11110

Name Suffix:<NSFX> Count

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
